payload.title: Headless opencode run intermittently hangs at startup
Argument parser bug causes beacon crashes and ghost beacons
Packet output mix up and server desync
Dll  Sideloading is not working with  Legit-Dll feature
Code execution cannot proceed because libstdc++-6.dll was not found
Running 32-bit beacon_http client on Win11/WinXP: Dependency missing error reported.
An error will occur in beacon x86 IAT Hiding mode
DNS Beacon fails to connect to Adaptix C2
dev-v1.3 doesn't build: TaskData.Priority missing from published axc2 + unused import in mgr_frame.go
Dll  Sideloading is not working with  Legit-Dll feature
Code execution cannot proceed because libstdc++-6.dll was not found
Running 32-bit beacon_http client on Win11/WinXP: Dependency missing error reported.
[bug] when new agent comes, the cursor in console will lose
